alt: Stunning adult leafy seadragon displaying its spectacular leaf-like camouflage appendages in crystal clear water
caption: The leafy seadragon is a master of camouflage, adorned with flowing leaf-like appendages that make it look exactly like floating seaweed.
acquisitionNotes: Manually curated leafy seadragon hero image with verified species identification. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/5/50/Leafy_Seadragon_Phycodurus_eques_2500px.jpg
